name: image2tools
description: A simple GPT Image 2 desktop tool for generation, edits, inpainting, downloads, and local history.
author: Bliveren <aliveren_89@foxmail.com>

scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && pnpm build:main && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build:renderer && pnpm build:main
